name: Layered Mexican Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash the avocados with lemon juice to prevent darkening.
2. Layer refried beans on the bottom of a quiche dish or other flat-sided dish.
3. Next, layer the mashed avocados.
4. Mix yogurt and sour cream with taco seasoning for the next layer.
5. Top with grated cheese.
6. Add the chopped tomatoes as the final layer.
7. Serve with dipping chips.
